prompt: Create a new MCTP over PCIe VDM ingress IP for this IP namespace. Treat this as a draft locked-truth candidate requiring human approval before final truth lock. Preserve traceability as requirement_id -> obligation_id -> contract_ref -> evidence -> validator_result. At minimum generate requirements/SSOT for: PCIe VDM ingress filtering, MCTP packet parsing, payload byte count, contiguous SRAM payload storage, descriptor publication after final SRAM write accept, APB Q_PAYLOAD_COUNT visibility, valid/ready hold under backpressure, and explicit blocked owner routes for any missing standard authority or evidence. Do not hand-edit generated evidence or claim signoff without deterministic validators.
